---
title: "Online courses section updated"
date: 2026-02-15
---

I’ve also updated the [**Teaching**](../teaching.html) section of my website to include my online teaching platform, [**Quant with Vahab**](https://www.quantwithvahab.com/).

The platform is being developed around quantitative finance, risk, evaluation, and decision systems. Its broader aim is to present rigorous ideas in a structured and practical way, connecting mathematical foundations with real analytical workflows.

The public platform is available here: [quantwithvahab.com](https://www.quantwithvahab.com/).
